name: OpenClaw Code Agent
description: Orchestrate coding agent sessions from OpenClaw

defaultWorkdir.description: Default working directory for new sessions

idleTimeoutMinutes.description: Idle timeout in minutes for multi-turn sessions before auto-kill

postTurnIdleMinutes.description: Minutes to wait after a turn completes (without a question) before auto-killing the session

maxPersistedSessions.description: Maximum number of completed sessions to keep in memory for resume

permissionMode.description: Default permission mode for coding agent sessions

agentChannels.description: Map of agent working directories to notification channels

maxAutoResponds.description: Maximum consecutive auto-responds per session before requiring user input

planApproval.description: Plan approval behavior. 'delegate' (default): orchestrator autonomously decides whether to approve low-risk plans or escalate to the user. 'approve': orchestrator can auto-approve after verification. 'ask': orchestrator always forwards plans to the user for approval.
